captions.01-instructions.png: Instructions explain the same/different color task and F/J keyboard shortcuts.
captions.02-trial-response-disabled.png: Response buttons are visible but disabled during the timed fixation/stimulus/blank sequence.
captions.03-trial-response-enabled.png: Same/Different response prompt is active after the blank interval.
captions.04-completion.png: Participant reaches the completion page after 10 trials.
